title: Le Moyne College extends president’s contract
summary: Le Moyne College announced a two-year contract extension for President Linda LeMura, extending her tenure through June 30, 2028. LeMura will become the longest-serving president in the college's 160+ year history in December 2025, having served since 2014. This is a leadership continuity announcement at a major higher education institution in the Syracuse region.
